src: One brain, many harnesses. Portable .agent/ folder (memory + skills + protocols) that plugs into Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Hermes, or DIY Python — and keeps its knowledge when you switch.
ja: ひとつの頭脳、多様なハーネス。Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf、OpenCode、OpenClaw、Hermes、またはDIY Pythonに接続できるポータブルな.agent/フォルダ（メモリ・スキル・プロトコル）。切り替えても知識を保持。
